intentAndPurpose.intent: Selection control with tri-state support (selected / indeterminate / unselected). `appearance` drives both unchecked border and checked fill via the parent <Surface>; auto resolves to the secondary stack. Read-only is distinct from disabled. For multi-option label stacks use CheckboxField.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label beside the control. Becomes the accessible name when no aria-label is set.

props.name: description
props.description: Supplementary copy below the label row (plain text only).

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Mixed state — wins over selected; maps to accessibilityState.checked="mixed".

props.name: onSelectedChange
props.description: Fires with the next selected value on press.

props.name: size
props.description: Legacy small/medium/large aliases canonicalise to s/m/l.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent role for border + checked fill, resolved against the parent <Surface>. 'auto' → secondary.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Non-toggleable but distinct from disabled (solid dark fill).

props.name: value
props.description: Option identifier read by CheckboxField to map selection keys.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: [error] Don't paint directly. Use `appearance` (role) + `variant`/`mode` and wrap in <Surface mode>; the brand cascade picks the right fill.

props.name: style
props.description: Layout style only. backgroundColor / borderColor are forbidden — appearance + surface drive the fill. — [warn] Don't paint the Checkbox. Use `appearance`; the surface cascade resolves border + checked fill.
